commands.repair_reason: - [P1] Contributor proof and maintainer review are needed because the remaining blockers involve real client behavior and security-sensitive loopback request handling.; Needs attention: The diff still introduces a loopback security-boundary concern because GET opens SSE before browser-origin validation.; Review finding: [P1] Route GET through the browser-origin gate — src/gateway/mcp-http.request.ts:122-138 - [P2] A... (sha=8bba1677c90ce8754d73df66bbbdaaa479765713)
commands.review_summary:
Adds GET/SSE and DELETE handling to the gateway MCP loopback endpoint and adds an `Mcp-Session-Id` header to JSON POST responses.

PR surface: Source +50. Total +50 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source: current main advertises a Streamable HTTP loopback config but rejects non-POST `/mcp` requests, while the MCP/Codex Streamable HTTP client path can open a GET SSE stream. I did not run a full live Claude Code end-to-end session.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Contributor proof and maintainer review are needed because the remaining blockers involve real client behavior and security-sensitive loopback request handling.

target.title: fix(gateway): support Streamable HTTP MCP transport on loopback server
target.body:
## Summary

- The MCP loopback HTTP server (`mcp-http.request.ts`) rejects GET requests with 405, but the MCP config it generates specifies `"type": "http"` (Streamable HTTP transport)
- Claude Code's Streamable HTTP client sends GET to `/mcp` to open an SSE notification channel as part of initialization
- The 405 response causes Claude Code to hang at "still connecting" indefinitely, leaving the agent without any OpenClaw MCP tools for the entire session
- Added GET/SSE support (idle stream, auth-gated), DELETE for session teardown, and `Mcp-Session-Id` header on POST responses per the Streamable HTTP spec

## Test plan

- [ ] Verify GET `/mcp` with valid bearer returns 200 + `text/event-stream`
- [ ] Verify GET `/mcp` without auth returns 401
- [ ] Verify DELETE `/mcp` returns 200
- [ ] Verify POST `/mcp` responses include `Mcp-Session-Id` header
- [ ] Verify unsupported methods still return 405
- [ ] End-to-end: Claude Code session connects to OpenClaw MCP tools without "still connecting"
target.author: anagnorisis2peripeteia

commands.reason: PR is not opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
